questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The United States has maintained its position as a unipolar power since the end of the Cold War.
questions.reason: Reason (R): This is because of its unparalleled military capabilities, economic strength, and dominant position in international institutions.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The US has maintained its position as a unipolar power due to its military capabilities and economic strength, which are the key factors mentioned in reason R.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): US foreign policy has been characterized by a strong emphasis on promoting democracy and human rights worldwide.
